intro.title: Community gatherings with a neighborly spirit.
intro.text: Our Social Committee organizes a full season of neighborhood events for kids, parents, and anyone who enjoys good company. We kick things off with the Memorial Day Pool Party, featuring a DJ, live music, and a long, lazy lunch. Summer stays mellow with dive-in movie nights, and we stitch the year together with back-to-school socials, a Fall Festival, Halloween Costumes & Cocktails, and a cozy Breakfast with Santa. Watch the community messaging group for invites and sign-ups.

seasonal.detail: Pancakes, coffee, and hundreds of hidden eggs. The kids run the show while neighbors trade stories over morning coffee.
Our biggest party of the year. Expect poolside music, a DJ or band, catered food, and plenty of cold drinks to welcome summer and the Stingrays' season.
Float in the pool or lounge on the terrace while enjoying popcorn and a big screen under the stars.
A low-key neighborhood mixer to mark the start of the new school year. All families are welcome.
Pumpkins, crafts, and seasonal treats make for a fun autumn afternoon with the neighborhood.
An evening for adults with themed drinks and spirited costumes, offering a grown-up take on Halloween.
Donuts, hot cocoa, crafts, and a visit from Santa bring the kids together for a cozy morning they will remember.
